summary: M312 — UI unification batch: HireBuilderScreen wider class cards + chronomancer fits, DifficultyDialog escape + close fix, Settings difficulty row removed, TitleScreen instant fade-in (no slide-down) + cloud layer overlap, save menu flex 0 1 auto + floating Back, Statistics Esc closes properly + persisted run stats, custom confirm modal replaces window.confirm, Tavern routes to PartyPanelScreen, PartyPanel gold/brown redesign with town-style tabs, hidden equip-panel portrait, green-styled auto-equip with sweep on toggle, .inv-char-class margin, reusable settingsPanel component.
